title: TQ's Track Playtime in Tab
description: Track each player's total playtime, to be displayed in the tab menu.
body:
Track each player's total playtime (in minutes), to be displayed in the tab menu. 
Inspired by [Vanilla Tweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net/picker/datapacks/)' Track Raw Statistics. Works on both single- and multiplayer.

---
